results.name: baseline
results.description: 初始界面状态

results.description: 点击端口下拉框，预期显示COM口列表

results.description: 点击波特率下拉，预期显示常用波特率列表

results.name: view_mode
results.description: 点击查看模式切换（文本/HEX）

results.name: line_ending
results.description: 点击行尾下拉，预期显示CRLF/LF/CR/无

results.description: 未选端口时点击开始监控，预期显示错误提示

results.name: clear_button
results.description: 点击清除按钮

results.name: auto_scroll_toggle
results.description: 点击自动滚动按钮，预期切换高亮状态

results.name: auto_reconnect_toggle
results.description: 点击自动重连按钮

results.name: terminal_mode
results.description: 点击终端模式按钮

results.name: line_numbers_toggle
results.description: 点击行号按钮

results.name: timestamp_toggle
results.description: 点击时间戳按钮

results.name: echo_toggle
results.description: 点击回显按钮

results.name: more_settings
results.description: 点击更多设置按钮，预期展开/折叠高级设置行

results.name: collapse_toolbar
results.description: 点击折叠工具栏按钮

results.name: add_rule
results.description: 点击添加规则按钮

results.name: quick_commands_panel
results.description: 点击快捷指令按钮，预期弹出面板

results.name: wsl_panel
results.description: 点击WSL端口映射按钮，预期切换到WSL面板

results.name: wsl_back
results.description: 点击返回监视器按钮

results.name: theme_toggle
results.description: 点击主题切换开关，预期深浅色切换

results.name: theme_style_dropdown
results.description: 点击主题风格下拉，预期显示6种风格

results.name: add_monitor
results.description: 点击打开额外监视器，预期分栏显示

results.name: close_monitor
results.description: 关闭额外监视器

results.name: input_text
results.description: 在输入框输入AT+VERSION?

results.name: send_mode_toggle
results.description: 切换发送模式（文本/HEX）

results.name: send_no_connection
results.description: 未连接时点击发送按钮

results.name: submit_issue
results.description: 点击提交issue按钮

results.name: theme_ukiyo
results.description: 切换到浮世绘彩主题风格

results.name: theme_poetic
results.description: 切换到诗意东方主题风格
